Helio..Back: Opisthotonos; head drawn back, cerebro-spinal meningitis.
Helio..Bladder: The bladder is in a similar state. There is no ability to use the abdominal muscles; he cannot strain to urinate retention of accelerator muscles are in a state of paresis.
Helio..Extremities: Weakness of limbs and muscles; weakness and paralysis.
Helio..Extremities, coldness: if the mother puts that child into a hot bath, to relieve the convulsions, it will become unconscious and cold as death.
Helio..Extremities, paralysis: Weakness of limbs and muscles; weakness and paralysis.
Helio..Generalities: Among the striking features of Opium is a class of complaints marked by painlessness, inactivity, and torpor.
Helio..Genitalia female: A pregnant woman is frightened and an abortion is impending, and the object of the fright continually looms up before her eyes.
Helio..Head: Nervous headaches beginning in the back of the head and spreading over the whole face; worse in the morning. He feels as if his head were held down to the pillow by the intense aching pain in the base of the brain and yet when he gets up he is unable to lie down again.
Helio..Mind: A mental state appears in these constitutions. Fear and its results. The Opium patient, when not too stupid, rouses up as if startled, rouses up with the appearance of awful fear or anxiety.
Helio..Rectum: Paralytic conditions or paresis, partial paralysis; inactivity, sluggishness. Such a condition is found in the bowels so that they do not move, and rectum fills with round, hard, black balls, which can be dug out with the finger or spoon. There is no activity, no ability to strain at stool.
Helio..Rectum, constipation: rectum fills with round, hard, black balls, which can be dug out with the finger or spoon. There is no activity, no ability to strain at stool.
Helio..Respiration: cerebral apoplexy with stertorous breathing, jaw dropped, pupils dilated or contracted, generally the latter, face mottled, purple, or hot, hot sweat, one sided paralysis.
Helio..Respiration, difficult: cerebral apoplexy with stertorous breathing, jaw dropped, pupils dilated or contracted.
Helio..Skin: skin red; face red and mottled, pupils contracted.
Helio..Sleep: The patient is sleepy, yet at times the drug is characterized by sleepless nights, anxiety, increased sensitiveness to noise, so that he says ho can almost hear the flies walking on the wall, and hears the clock striking in the distant steeple.
Helio..Sleep, restless: sleepless nights, anxiety, increased sensitiveness to noise, so that he says ho can almost hear the flies walking on the wall, and hears the clock striking in the distant steeple.
Helio..Sleep, sleepiness: Drowsiness with headache, amounting almost to stupor.
Helio..Stomach: The stomach is in a state of undue warmth, sinking, all-gone, hungry, and this is not relieved by eating. He fills the stomach full and yet the faint feeling remains. The food sours in the stomach and is vomited.
Helio..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): The stomach is in a state of undue warmth, sinking, all-gone, hungry, and this is not relieved by eating. He fills the stomach full and yet the faint feeling remains.
Helio..Bladder, urination: The bladder is in a similar state. There is no ability to use the abdominal muscles; he cannot strain to urinate retention of accelerator muscles are in a state of paresis.
